arts.ttl: Middlesbrough in talks to sign Aston Villa winger as Michael Carrick's side also look to beat Celtic to former Manchester City star
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Middlesbrough are in talks to sign a winger from Aston Villa. Michael Carrick's side are also looking to beat Celtic to a former Manchester City star.

arts.ttl: Liverpool overcome big Bournemouth hurdle to put spotlight on Arsenal
arts.sum: Where Arsenal, Nottingham Forest and Manchester City failed before them, a Mohamed Salah-inspired Liverpool prevailed, winning at AFC Bournemouth as Arne Slot's Reds went nine points clear at the top of the Premier League. Andoni Iraola's side had beaten the second, third and fourth-placed teams at home this season and were looking to complete the set on Saturday and dent their opponents' hopes of winning only a second-ever Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Arsenal target Matheus Cunha sends transfer message with very public declaration
arts.sum: Wolves star Matheus Cunha has been linked with a move to Arsenal throughout the winter transfer window but the in-form Brazilian looks set to stay beyond Monday's 11pm deadline

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard fires title warning ahead of blockbuster Arsenal-Man City clash
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard has seen his side turn on the style when the pressure is on, but they are yet to get over the line to win the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Arsenal - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting Manchester City's starting XI for their Premier League clash against Arsenal on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Manchester City and Crystal Palace strikers join Motherwell on loan ahead of Celtic clash
arts.sum: The Steelmen have swooped ahead of a big clash at Fir Park tomorrow

arts.ttl: 'Wouldn't be surprised': Chris Sutton and Paul Merson agree on Arsenal v Manchester City score prediction
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City are set to lock horns in a huge Premier League encounter at the Emirates Stadium on Sunday. Over the past few...

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins to Arsenal transfer takes huge twist as Aston Villa forced into unwanted decision
arts.sum: Arsenal transfer target Ollie Watkins appeared to pick up an injury during Aston Villa's Premier League clash against Wolves. With one new attacking signing set to arrive, Watkins also departing is feasible but as it turns out, neither Emery or Mikel Arteta may have him available for the next few weeks.

arts.ttl: Newcastle handed harsh reminder by Fulham ahead of Arsenal home leg
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe says his side’s home defeat to Fulham is reminder they will have to be at their very best to see off Arsenal in the League Cup next week. Jacob Murphy put the Magpies in front at St James’ Park, but the visitors turned it around after the break. arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins subbed off at half-time in Aston Villa's defeat at Wolves after appearing to suffer an injury - with Arsenal target one of FOUR changes made by Unai Emery at the interval
arts.sum: Emery reacted to a sluggish performance by his team in Saturday's Premier League clash with Wolves by making four substitutions during the half-time interval.
